productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Navy Blue Capris
description: Style NoteLittle girls will love these capris from Gini and Jony. The elasticated waistband gives a great Fit, while the cotton fabric keeps her feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team them with tees and comfy footwear for a stylish, casual look.Product DetailsNavy blue denim capris, has a buttoned and zippered closure, belt loops around the waist, two insert  pockets in front, 2 patch pockets at the back, stitched butterfly decoration on the left thigh and the patch pockets at the back and slits at the hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldDo not tumble dryUse warm iron; do not iron on decorations
